title: auricula-ursi pedemontana
intro: Auricula-ursi pedemontana, also known as Bearberry or European Bearberry, is a shrub-like perennial plant belonging to the heath family (Ericaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and astringent, which can help to relieve urinary tract issues and reduce inflammation. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support kidney function, alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, and even help to manage certain types of diarrhea. Auricula-ursi pedemontana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
